flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Montana State University-Northern fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (23.8% → 18.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Montana State University-Northern rose 22% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.2k → $18.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Montana State University-Northern rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.0k → $7.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Montana State University-Northern rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.7k → $21.9k).
